rounds: Pink hat and knit cardigan stayed home at run club — that one goes to them. But Lavendra with the necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers? Full picture, people who know him, no armour — that one's his. Pink thong to Balmoral, changed into it in the change room after — active choice, nobody made him do that. And standing in a chemist aisle comparing nail shades without flinching? That's not nothing. That's a whole thing.
pattern: They're loud in front of his people, quiet with strangers — the real frontier isn't the general public, it's the swim group.
focus: Look at one daily routine this week and ask — is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
